name: notambourine
description: Supply-chain security tooling for Claude Code, by NoTambourine.

plugins.name: wormhook
plugins.description: npm/node supply-chain malware scanner for Claude Code. Tiered hook detecting Shai-Hulud (1.0-3.0 + Mini), Axios/DPRK RAT, SANDWORM_MODE, the Hades/PyPI .pth startup-hook wave, and remote-eval loaders via filename, SHA256, and behavioral IOCs. Adds an unknown-worm publish-age cooldown, Python (pip/uv) execution gating, and a UserPromptSubmit continuous monitor.
